query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'shipped' AND created_at > '2024-06-01'
SELECT * FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE created_at > '2024-01-01')
SELECT u.name, o.id FROM users u, orders o WHERE u.id = o.user_id AND o.order_status = 'shipped'
SELECT o.* FROM orders o WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.quantity > 3)
